examples: Each Kura store is also highly automated.
In the last two months alone, Kura has added seven stores.
Efficiency is Paramount at Kura: absent are the traditional sushi chefs and their painstaking attention to detail.
Te Kura A Rito O Newton received a special school award.
Te Kura A Rito O Newton sent in more entries than any other school - their students also submitted all their biodiversity statements in te reo Maori as well as in English.
